nasb.text: Now when the queen of Sheba heard about the fame of Solomon concerning the name of the Lord, she came to test him with difficult questions.

esv.text: Now when the queen of Sheba heard of the fame of Solomon concerning the name of the Lord, she came to test him with hard questions.

cnv.text: 示巴女王聽到所羅門因耶和華的名所得的名聲，就來要用難題試試他。

ccb.text: 示巴女王听说所罗门因耶和华而名声大震，便来用难题考问他。
